critic_approval_2026_04_26.category_immunity_rank: highest of the live-readiness packet — narrow scope, precise pins, exemplary discipline
critic_approval_2026_04_26.verification_method: empirical re-audit of both absorption halves + per-test review

amendments_applied_inline.U1_NICE_TO_HAVE_1_fixture_cleanup: _hk_city() and _wu_celsius_city() helpers now return cities_by_name['Hong Kong'] and cities_by_name['Taipei'] instead of synthetic City instantiation. Tracks production config drift automatically. Fixed real divergence (production HK has wu_station=None; synthetic was '' — both worked but schema-divergent).
amendments_applied_inline.U1_NICE_TO_HAVE_2_alias_edge_cases: test_oracle_truncate_semantically_equivalent_to_floor sample array extended from 8 to 16 cases: canonical positive (6) + negative/near-zero (5) + Vostok extreme + precision boundaries (1e-10, 1e15) + non-finite (NaN, +inf). Added explicit NaN-propagation assertion via np.isnan masking — alias contract holds even for values that assert_settlement_value rejects upstream.

operator_visible_recommendation.from_critic_ask_3_response: Recommend including HK in G7's INITIAL LIVE_SAFE_CITIES set, NOT deferring to a wave-2 expansion. Reasoning: workbook intent 'until both ship' = eligible after both ship; both shipped; alternative ('US-only initial set') would require another packet just to add HK, contradicting the audit chain.

pattern_lesson_elevation.lesson_14_grep_gate_before_scoping: L20 grep-gate before scoping multi-deliverable workbook entries elevated to critic standing-order per con-nyx Ask #5. U1 slice is the canonical example — workbook said triple-deliverable, audit found double-absorption, slice scope reduced to antibody-only without losing safety. Saves tail-end scope creep when half the work is already done.

code_half.evidence: src/contracts/settlement_semantics.py:171 uses rounding_rule='oracle_truncate'; lines 71-79 dispatch oracle_truncate AND floor to np.floor(scaled). oracle_truncate is the named alias for floor with HKO/UMA justification. Landed in commit d99273a 'feat: Oracle Penalty system + SettlementSemantics oracle_truncate + round_fn injection' before this workbook was authored.
code_half.empirical: 14/14 (100%) HKO same-source match vs 5/14 (36%) under wmo_half_up — recorded in known_gaps.md:141-148.

constitutional_half.evidence: grep -inE 'half.?up|WMO|asymmetric|universal' AGENTS.md returns ZERO matches as of 2026-04-26. AGENTS.md (335 lines) no longer carries the 'WMO half-up universal' claim that the workbook L49+L117 citation referenced. Some intervening change discharged the constitutional concern; no AGENTS.md amendment needed.

antibody_half.evidence: Search returned no dedicated tests/test_hk_settlement_floor_rounding.py file. Two tests touch oracle_truncate semantically (test_phase10c_dt_seam_followup.py, test_pe_reconstruction_relationships.py) but neither pins HK as a regression antibody.

departures_from_g6_pattern.skipped_red_commit: Production code pre-correct (oracle_truncate alias + dispatch already shipped via d99273a). RED-then-GREEN ritual would be theatre. B5 single-GREEN-commit pattern reused.
departures_from_g6_pattern.did_not_amend_agents_md: Workbook cited AGENTS.md L49+L117 as needing constitutional amendment. Grep shows the cited claim is ALREADY GONE. No write needed; would be a no-op.

operator_visible_consequences.hk_eligibility_for_LIVE_SAFE_CITIES: Per workbook U1 acceptance: 'HK excluded from LIVE_SAFE_CITIES until both ship'. Both have shipped (code via predecessor + antibody via this slice). HK is now ELIGIBLE per workbook intent. Whether HK is ACTUALLY ADDED to LIVE_SAFE_CITIES is a separate operator decision tracked under G7-LIVE_SAFE_CITIES (Wave 2 slice).

followups_owed.summary: When G7 ships, decide whether HK is included in LIVE_SAFE_CITIES initial set. Per U1 closure, HK is now eligible. Per known_gaps.md HKO empirical match (14/14 = 100%), HK is the most settlement-stable city in the codebase.
followups_owed.gating: G7 collision check on executor.py against pr18 worktree

lore_extraction_recommendation: Workbook L20 (grep-gate file:line within 10 min) was load-bearing here — it surfaced the double absorption that would have caused 1.5h of redundant code+constitutional work. Pattern feedback: every multi-deliverable workbook entry should be grep-gated for predecessor absorption before scoping the slice. Already in operating procedure; no new lore card needed.
